title: Inbox ignores domain_blocks table
description: The inbox processing code (inbox.rs process_inbox) never consults the domain_blocks table. When an admin blocks a domain via 'smallhold domain-block add', the block is recorded in the database but incoming activities from that domain are still fully processed — follows are accepted, likes generate notifications, posts are stored. The inbox should check domain_blocks at the start of process_inbox and reject activities from suspended domains with a 403.
